description_text:
BPL Harmony Auto CPAP Machine 

BPL Harmony is an Auto CPAP Machine which comes with CPAP and APAP therapy modes along with many essential features - 


	
	High Performance Motor: 
	


A silent DC brushless motor with a rapid 0.2-second response time offers a remarkable 20,000 hours of service life.


	
	User Friendly design:
	


The humidifier can be detached from the device, and the main part can be used separately.


	
	Highly Accurate Sensors: 
	


With advanced pressure and flow sensors, Harmony accurately collects and provides real-time control of pressure and flow signal changes to users.


	
	Multiple Alerts: 
	


BPL Harmony comes with smart alerts like High Pressure alert and Leak Reminders for safe and convenient use.


	Warranty: 


The machine comes with a warranty of 2 years. 

What's in the Box?


	CPAP Device
	Humidifier
	Hose Pipe
	Mask
	Power Adapter & Cable
	Filter
	User Manual
